{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230253118FD8E4E453900C41DB6C"}"},"total":12},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7509082121609560857","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错的书，很喜欢，值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748347435,"group_id":"7374245481024605208","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1L2mP8hy40Isbb3Mu2Yl/Q=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"106071590796","user_name":"花儿与少年ns"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106071590796","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7374245481024605208","book_info":{"abstract":"年级垫底王赵钰，被马家大少当众嘲讽学渣！
　　无比憋屈的赵钰，回家之后准备发愤图强。
　　却是无意间获得了老爸留下的戒指，激活了成长系统。
　　开局新手大礼包，奖励200成长值，超等数学！
　　说我是垫底王拉低升学率？
　　系统，那就全都加到智力！
　　赵钰在全加智力成了学霸之后，分分钟在图书馆解决了校花的难题，成功获取校花好感，甚至主动求赵钰帮她补课来培养感情！
　　又仅凭简单的数学计算，就让马家大少被小混混当街暴打一顿。
　　凭借这个成长系统，赵钰一步步成为了最强全能学神！
　　超级人工智能“赵霸”只要一天就能研发出来。
　　这么智能的人工智能，多少钱可以用？
　　7G网络的极速让其他国家还在使用5G的人彻底眼红了。
　　这么快的网络，多少钱可以授权我们？
　　更有遥遥领先的元宇宙世界级游戏！
　　这游戏这么真实吗？我宁愿永远待在里面！
　　凭借一己之力，赵钰逐渐让全世界都跟在夏国后面卑微讨好！
　　但父亲的失踪之谜，依然等待着赵钰亲自解开…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ocfd89c26f8ddec6c6aeaa18406453af1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"桃芝儿","author_id":"","book_id":"7374245481024605208","book_name":"超凡学神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7374596019058639384","read_count":"225","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1187286"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"570","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,学霸,多女主,校花,全能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b2f37259909d6c9ffe3580876ef7c261~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389591&x-signature=YDUgS6k5ereOtoKPhMZWp85A8B8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"86709438878","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230253118FD8E4E453900C41DB6C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_s
